docket_entries.description: ISSUED AND SENT SUBPENA PAPERS PER DEF.'S WRITTEN REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-12-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-20-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
